rationale: The operative notion is 'cannot be true under ... an interpretation', i.e. the satisfaction (truth) relation, which def:axiom-systems-satisfaction supplies; that single edge carries the definition.
notes: def:axiom-systems-interpretation is invoked by 'a given interpretation' but is ambient here: satisfaction is already defined relative to an interpretation, so it is the locator, not a separate load-bearing prerequisite. Candidate edge if the reviewer wants interpretation surfaced explicitly. (Aside, not a dependency matter: 'cannot be true under a given interpretation' reads closer to false-in-a-model than to a genuine contradiction/unsatisfiability.)
